title: ReservationLedger exact claim custody and allocation epochs
summary: Add generation-aware exact claim custody APIs and independently rooted allocation-free release/read closure for WM-0170 and WM-0171.
acceptance: ReservationTransactionRequest accepts optional uint32 jobGeneration for source compatibility, normalizes an omitted value to required record value 0 for legacy callers, and requires a positive exact JobCore token generation for autonomous claims; record views, snapshots, hashes, restore validation and every exact read/release path preserve the required scalar

Every active reservation record owns a positive uint32 allocationEpoch equal to the successful transaction's post-acquire ledger version; recycled claim ids receive a different epoch, zero/future/wrapped epochs reject, the ReservationLedger snapshot schema version increments, and old-shape restore is rejected rather than synthesized

releaseClaimsInto uses caller-owned id/epoch inputs and output, validates exact integer count 1..8, both input lengths, duplicates, owner EntityId, job id/generation, allocation epochs, current ledger version and version headroom all-before-any, reports the first deterministic index/id/reason, and releases only the exact prefix in reverse order with one truthful version/count/metric commit

readActiveClaimsInto is allocation-free and read-only, validates the same exact prefix/binding/epoch contract against a freshly sampled current ledger version, resets and fills fourteen exact length-eight output lanes in input order, preserves Float64 safe created/lease Ticks, and accepts no partial prefix

Every claim-creating acquire rejects current ledger versions 0xffff_fffe and 0xffffffff before mutation, exact release may consume the final legal bump, no version or epoch wraps, and focused boundary tests cover fffc through ffff plus fresh, reused and full-capacity compensation ordering

Legacy acquire/release behavior and signatures remain compatible, no positive-generation claim can be matched by broad legacy owner/job cleanup, the public package entry exports only the reviewed new contracts, and snapshot/restore/hash tests cover mixed old shape, wrong generation and recycled claim ABA

A receiver-exact TypeScript TypeChecker closure independently roots releaseClaimsInto and readActiveClaimsInto and proves caller-owned output identity, prefix-only bounded loops, no for-of, Set, object/array/closure/string allocation, unresolved receiver, broad release or materializing compatibility API on either reachable body

The task changes only the frozen ReservationLedger custody files, their focused/closure/hash/export tests, its own coordination artifacts and one director-approved dependent Worker golden test; the Worker exception is limited to replacing exactly the two deterministic world/read-model hash literals caused by adding jobGeneration/allocationEpoch to canonical hashing, and it does not permit Worker production logic, ResidentAutonomyStore, JobCore, claim-ready domain owners, historical drivers, GameSession integration, protocol/product files, dependencies or benchmarks
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec prettier --check packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.ts packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger-closure.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/game-session-hash-owner-fields.ts packages/sim-core/src/index.ts packages/sim-worker/src/game-session-worker.test.ts coordination/tasks/WM-0182.json coordination/reports/WM-0182.md

history.details: Created as the first of exactly two serial prerequisites after independent B3 PLAN PASS at 7a483fc54701eeddb0e3285929dadb2971880075; exclusively owns ReservationLedger claim custody and is ready because WM-0177 is done.

Required canonical hash coverage changes GameSession hashes, but pnpm quality now fails the hardcoded golden in packages/sim-worker/src/game-session-worker.test.ts (expected 0x5c850f07/0x33affcde; actual 0x794ba2ff/0x026c716c). That file is outside WM-0182 allowedPaths. Please expand allowedPaths for this exact golden-only test update or provide an approved contract resolution; weakening ReservationLedger hash coverage would violate WM-0182 acceptance.

Resolved MSG-MRIZF57K-B91F07 after read-only architecture audit: add only packages/sim-worker/src/game-session-worker.test.ts and permit only the two deterministic golden literal updates 0x5c850f07 -> 0x794ba2ff and 0x33affcde -> 0x026c716c. No Worker production, protocol, integration or historical evidence changes are allowed; focused Worker test and full quality remain mandatory.
Approved exact golden-only scope refinement after MSG-MRIZF57K-B91F07: one Worker test file, two deterministic literals, no Worker production changes.

Implemented generation-aware ReservationLedger exact claim custody with allocation epochs, allocation-free exact release/read closures, snapshot v2/hash/restore/export coverage, version and ABA boundaries, and the director-approved Worker golden update; 44 focused tests, 15 Worker tests, all gates, and 522-test quality pass

changes_requested: High: packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.ts:1049 makes readActiveClaimsInto expose internal amount=1 for ENTITY, CELL, and INTERACTION_SPOT, contradicting approved WM-0170 plan blob line 526 that only ITEM_QUANTITY/CAPACITY carry amount; packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.test.ts:756 locks the wrong [1,1,2,1,3] result. Normalize non-quantity/capacity amounts to zero and add exact [0,0,2,0,3] regression. High: packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger-closure.test.ts:147-152 accepts every same-source resolved target without checking receiver identity, while the foreign-receiver negative at 307-318 uses a different auditor, so the two formal roots are not proven receiver-exact. Enforce receiver-exact traversal in the production closure auditor and exercise a same-source foreign/same-name receiver through that same path. Typecheck, 44 focused tests, 15 Worker tests, boundaries, handoff, taskctl validate/status, diff checks, and full quality 522 passed; scoped pnpm-exec shims failed in this Windows shell and direct locked .CMD equivalents passed, except current taskctl-complete WM-0182.json formatting drift.

Addressed Mirror changes_requested: readActiveClaimsInto now emits amounts only for ITEM_QUANTITY/CAPACITY with exact [0,0,2,0,3] regression; formal TypeChecker root traversal now enforces receiver identity and rejects foreign, non-this, and unresolved receivers through the same auditor. 46 focused tests, 15 Worker tests, all gates, and 524-test quality pass.

verified: Repair-1 independently verified at a17ae56. Original High 1 is closed: readActiveClaimsInto emits zero amounts for ENTITY/CELL/INTERACTION_SPOT, preserves record amounts only for ITEM_QUANTITY/CAPACITY, and the all-five-channel regression is exactly [0,0,2,0,3] with existing all-before-any and fourteen-lane coverage passing. Original High 2 is closed: both production roots use auditMethodClosure, whose same traversal now validates declaration owner plus literal-this receiver identity; foreign-class same-name, same-class non-this, and unresolved receiver negatives all run through that formal auditor and fail closed. Repair diff is limited to reservation-ledger.ts/test, closure test, and WM-0182 report; Worker golden/production and task scope are unchanged. Typecheck, 46 focused, 15 Worker, repair-scoped Prettier, boundaries, handoff, taskctl validate/status, diff checks, and full quality 80 files/524 tests passed; only expected taskctl-complete task JSON formatting drift remains outside the committed repair.
Fast-forwarded independently verified WM-0182 commits through 99dc939 onto main; main full quality passed 80 files and 524 tests.

forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-core/src/job-core.ts, item-stack-store.ts, storage-logistics-index.ts, m3-*.ts, hauling-jobs.ts or m4-lamp-network.ts

GameSession runtime/tick/initializer/product construction, packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/sim-worker/** except the exact two-golden-only packages/sim-worker/src/game-session-worker.test.ts refinement, apps/**, renderer or UI files
broad owner/job reservation cleanup for positive-generation claims, a new runtime dependency, benchmark/baseline/admission changes or release actions
executionLane: simulation-engineer; Spark is prohibited because this task changes authoritative ReservationLedger schema, ABA identity, snapshot/hash/restore and public owner contracts
singleWriterRule: WM-0182 is the sole ready repair writer. WM-0183 remains proposed behind WM-0182, and WM-0170 retains its original owner/checkpoint while blocked until both prerequisites are independently verified, integrated and done.
integrationOrder: First prerequisite. Independent reviewer verification, project-director integration and done are mandatory before WM-0183 may become ready.
